vocab.meaning: khởi đầu tốt đẹp, thuận lợi
vocab.example: Gifting an apricot blossom tree during Tet is thought to ensure an auspicious beginning for the new year.

vocab.meaning: tượng trưng cho sự thịnh vượng
vocab.example: Many Vietnamese people choose money plants as gifts because they are believed to symbolize prosperity and wealth.
Potted plants are a staple gift at any housewarming party in Vietnam to bring life to the new home.
There is a growing trend among urbanites to exchange ornamental plants to decorate their limited living spaces.

vocab.meaning: xua đuổi vận đen, điềm xui
vocab.example: Some specific types of cacti are gifted with the belief that they can help ward off bad luck or negative energy.

vocab.meaning: truyền tải những lời chúc chân thành
vocab.example: Sending a delicate orchid is an elegant way to convey heartfelt wishes on a special occasion like a grand opening.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn được yêu thích từ trước đến nay (không lỗi thời)
vocab.example: Bonsai trees remain a perennial favorite among the older generation due to their artistic and historical value.
Beyond their meaning, plants are gifted for their aesthetic appeal, instantly brightening up any interior.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/phát triển một sở thích
vocab.example: Younger people often gift succulents to friends to help them cultivate a hobby of indoor gardening.

vocab.meaning: ý nghĩa về mặt văn hóa
vocab.example: The practice of giving peach blossoms carries deep cultural significance, rooted in centuries of Vietnamese tradition.
